name: flyto-i18n
description: Flyto2 localization, multilingual SEO, hreflang, and public keyword contract shared across apps, docs, blog, and open-source packages.

scripts.lint: python3 -m compileall -q scripts tests translate_th.py && ruff check scripts tests translate_th.py && npm run docs:check
scripts.test: python3 scripts/validate.py --strict && python3 scripts/coverage.py --json >/tmp/flyto-i18n-coverage.json && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
